jobs.title: Senior Product Designer
jobs.description: Lead product design for tools used by thousands of modern teams. You will partner with product and engineering from discovery through delivery.
jobs.requirements:
5+ years of product design experience
Strong portfolio of end-to-end product work
Experience with design systems and user research

jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.description: Build polished, accessible interfaces for a fast-growing creative platform using React, TypeScript, and a thoughtful design system.
jobs.requirements:
3+ years building web applications
Strong React and JavaScript skills
A practical understanding of accessibility

jobs.title: Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Own integrated campaigns across content, lifecycle, and paid channels while helping shape the voice of a growing consumer brand.
jobs.requirements:
4+ years in growth or product marketing
Excellent writing and campaign planning skills
Experience measuring campaign performance

jobs.title: Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Design reliable APIs and distributed systems that power our global infrastructure platform. Experience with Node.js or Go is welcome.
jobs.requirements:
Strong backend engineering fundamentals
Experience designing APIs and data models
Comfort working with cloud infrastructure

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description: Turn complex customer data into clear insights and dashboards that help teams make confident, evidence-based decisions.
jobs.requirements:
Advanced SQL skills
Experience with dashboard tools
Clear written and verbal communication

jobs.title: UX Researcher
jobs.description: Plan and lead generative and evaluative research that improves digital healthcare experiences for patients and providers.
jobs.requirements:
Experience planning mixed-method research
Strong synthesis and presentation skills
Healthcare experience is helpful but not required
